message:
🌱 Add kserve: Support  for PySpark 2.4.4 Mllib  mission (#1568)

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,77 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "kserve-706-support-for-pyspark-2-4-4-mllib",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "kserve: Support  for PySpark 2.4.4 Mllib ",
+    "description": "Support  for PySpark 2.4.4 Mllib . Requested by 13+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current kserve deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your kserve version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n kserve -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kserve\nhelm list -n kserve 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working kserve installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review kserve configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant kserve configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n kserve -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kserve\nkubectl get configmap -n kserve -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=kserve\n```\nHi, our current pipeline and models are implemented using PySpark Mllib. After looking at the examples I realize we currently don't support PySpark Mllib."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Support  for PySpark 2.4.4 Mllib ",
+        "description": "spark.mllib supports model export to Predictive Model Markup Language (PMML), this is to show an example how you can serve a pmml model on KFServing exported fro spark mllib\n\n*(optional, in `fixes #<issue number>(, fixes #<issue_number>, ...)` format, will close the issue(s) when PR gets merged)*:\n1. Please confirm that if this PR changes any image versions, then that's the sole change this PR makes.\n\nSee the source issue for community-verified solutions."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Upgrade kserve to include the fix",
+        "description": "If the fix is included in a newer release, upgrade kserve:\n```bash\nhelm repo update\nhelm upgrade kserve kserve/kserve --namespace kserve\n```\nVerify the upgrade:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n kserve\nhelm list -n kserve\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n kserve -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kserve\nkubectl get events -n kserve --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"Support  for PySpark 2.4.4 Mllib \" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "spark.mllib supports model export to Predictive Model Markup Language (PMML), this is to show an example how you can serve a pmml model on KFServing exported fro spark mllib\n\n*(optional, in `fixes #<issue number>(, fixes #<issue_number>, ...)` format, will close the issue(s) when PR gets merged)*:\n1.",
+      "codeSnippets": []
+    }
+  },
